scenario.title: Validator-only repaired empty-baseline P01 manifest
preconditions: A clean committed candidate is served under the sole migration lease.
Default URL contains no fixture query parameter.
A real team with sender and recipient sessions exists.

required: exactly one message record with stable message_id
delivery records for intended recipients only
terminal injected or explicit rejected delivery facts
team workspace contains the message and delivery truth
team entity/frame carries stable identity and nonregressing source/gateway cursors
one normalized comms item with stable ID
no sibling-map loss or duplicate after patch/reconstruction

golden_goose_acceptance_lessons: no composer without a selected thread/team
live projection and window coverage honesty

gooselake.reason: P01 observes durable message, delivery, event, and terminal facts; it changes no runtime behavior.

goosetower.reason: P01 observes team workspace/entity/frame/cursors; it changes no materializer or gateway behavior.

gooseweb.reason: P01 adds verification data and validators only; it changes no Worker, store, route, or React behavior.

auth_account_state.reason: Review uses existing development authentication with all evidence redacted; no auth/account contract changes.

protocol_generated_code.reason: No Protobuf schema or generated output is edited.

api_narrative_docs.reason: No runtime HTTP/API behavior changes, so OpenAPI and narrative API docs are unaffected.

assertions: composer and primary send action are inside viewport
focus, Escape, and return behavior are correct where a sheet is used

empty.expectation: Clear, non-fixture empty state and no stale rows.

loading.expectation: Honest loading state without fake message text.

stale_gap_replaying.expectation: Visible stale/replay state; no command is presented as converged.

rejection_conflict.expectation: Specific terminal rejection and no phantom visible success.

permission_denied.reason: P01 runs the existing owner/dev-auth flow; RBAC denial becomes product scope in P15-P17.

unsupported_provider.reason: Team delivery visibility is provider-independent in this current scenario.

terminal_error.expectation: Specific failure remains visible and cannot be classified as success.

default_fixture_leak_assertions: URL has no gooseweb fixture parameter.
Visible text contains no dev fixture markers or fake entities.
Fixture-only globals and controls are absent.
fixtures.gating: Any visual fixture must require both import.meta.env.DEV and an explicit query parameter.

schema_migration.reason: P01 adds versioned verification JSON only; no persistent product schema changes.

backfill.reason: No product data changes or historical transformation occur.

compatibility.reason: No runtime, Tower, browser protocol, or API compatibility surface changes.

rollback.reason: Verification artifacts are removed by reverting the P01 commit; product state is untouched.

performance.reason: P05 owns product performance calibration; P01 only requires deterministic validators to complete quickly.

security.reason: P01 enforces evidence redaction and secret rejection but changes no product security behavior.

data_retention_gc.reason: P01 defines evidence convention only and creates no durable product objects.

deployment.reason: No stack lifecycle or deployment implementation is introduced.

provenance_reuse.reason: Golden Goose tests were read as acceptance references; no source code was copied or adapted.

native_tauri_assumptions_removed.reason: No Golden Goose implementation code was reused.
